recentTweets.text:
Trump put me on his hit list for standing up to ICE.

"Anti-ICE Democrat?" Absolutely.

It's not "enforcing the law" to execute citizens in our streets or take a father from his kids at gunpoint.

Your Gestapo tactics have no place in America.

Resign. #AbolishICE

"Trust everyone, but cut the cards."

Secretary Bessent and Ted Cruz told us they want to hijack these accounts as a “back door” to privatize Social Security.

We won’t let them.

Donald Trump’s address to the nation was more of the same – debunked election lies to distract from his cost-raising agenda.

His "SAVE Act" would make it harder for women, people of color, and even our troops, to vote.

That's not a solution. That's a plan to silence your voice.

The horrific killings by ICE agents in Maine and Texas happened on Trump and Mullin’s watch, and we cannot let them dodge accountability. Secretary Mullin needs to resign & there must be an independent investigation. This administration can't be trusted to probe their own crimes! https://t.co/4yHmW7jm6C

Honored to join @CTDPH to kick off their new awareness campaign. Vaccines protect our kids, and parents deserve honest, science-based answers to their questions. Proud to bring home federal funding to make "Protect Who Matters Most" a reality! https://t.co/H2p9WjYPcm

Joan Sebastian Guerrero and Lorenzo Salgado Araujo should still be with us today. ICE operates above the law, terrorizing our communities and killing people in our streets.
 
Secretary Mullin has done nothing to rein in Trump's Department of Homeland Security. He needs to resign. https://t.co/ozSSaJ90js

Republicans just tried to pass the largest cut to veterans' benefits in our history. They wanted to cut disability compensation for 1.5 million Americans and triple VA home loan fees, while creating a $500 million slush fund for Big Tech. We defeated them.
https://t.co/zEq0g2vlee

Donald Trump is still trying to push through his $1.8 BILLION deal to use your tax dollars to pay himself, his family, and his MAGA allies.

He's not listening to the courts. Congress needs to stop him. I just signed @RepRaskin's petition to force a vote on ending it for good.

50 million more Americans have coverage thanks to the Affordable Care Act. Seniors are saving on their prescriptions because we strengthened Medicare.

There's more to do. In the wealthiest nation in the world, no one should go without healthcare.

It's time for Medicare for All. https://t.co/Cbgeu4cGi3

Honored to join the launch of the National Baptist Convention USA's Center for Social Justice with @RepJahanaHayes and Dr. Boise Kimber. Black representation is under siege. We must speak out to defend the right to vote, lift families out of poverty, and support good-paying jobs. https://t.co/dboCLAiEwL

RT @GovNedLamont: ⚠️ AIR QUALITY ALERT ⚠️

Canadian wildfire smoke is expected to impact CT’s air quality today.

Limit time outdoors, move…

Extreme floods—made worse by climate change—have plagued our region in recent years. @ChrisMurphyCT, @SenBlumenthal and I announced $300,000 in new funding to protect Plantsville homes & businesses from flooding and invest in a more resilient community. https://t.co/r8OP2pMqHM

While Republicans rush to approve billions for Trump's foreign wars slush fund, their State Department funding bill cuts support for women's health and bars organizations from even speaking about reproductive care or gender equality.

I voted NO on this reckless budget. https://t.co/k6srFL7jbl

I've heard heartbreaking stories from families separated from their loved ones in long-term care during the COVID-19 pandemic.

@RepTenney and I introduced a bill to guarantee visiting access for essential caregivers at nursing homes. Today, we passed it in the @WaysMeansCmte! https://t.co/LtoAzNBz8u

Trump wants to use your tax dollars to build an arch dedicated to himself, overlooking the sacred grounds of Arlington National Cemetery. Congress hasn't approved it, but he's pushing forward. 

@RepDonBeyer and I have a bill to stop this insult to our

Trump's minions put me on his hit list for a reason. I'm not afraid to call him out, and I never back down from a fight. When armed, masked agents snatch hard-working residents off our streets—tearing children from their parents—I stand up, and I speak out.

Every. Single. Time. https://t.co/cNbGEn6Snb

Republicans just released their new budget. It's got
💰$10 BILLION for Trump's "SAVE Act"
💰$70 BILLION for his Iran war
❌NOTHING for working families

Trump already cut healthcare to give tax breaks to billionaires. They're doubling down on his failures, without a dime for you.

Trump isn't interested in peace. He's putting our troops in harm's way as he ramps up his war of choice with Iran.

Servicemembers have died. Americans have paid $56 BILLION more at the pump.

I'm fighting to end this illegal war and suspend the gas tax to bring prices down now! https://t.co/EilRnRAlpj

Donald Trump and RFK Jr. tried to bully doctors and hospitals out of providing care for trans youth. We put pressure on them to stop. Thousands of Americans submitted comments opposing their cruel ban.

They just backed down. Don’t stop speaking out. https://t.co/W4udInCtbD

It was horrifying to watch Lorenzo Salgado Araujo and Joan Sebastian Guerrero be killed by ICE agents. Their deaths were avoidable and shamefully predictable. Limiting vehicle stops is no solution for this madness. ICE needs to be dismantled, and Secretary Mullin must resign. https://t.co/iQMav75Uke

Last year, Trump tried to cut off investments in our state's small manufacturers - a program that's created more than 1,000 jobs here in Connecticut. @SenBlumenthal and I took him on, and secured another $1.8 million for @CONNSTEP to help grow our manufacturing supply chain. https://t.co/GGTDQ6hwZa

As families struggle to make ends meet, Republicans are spending your tax dollars on foreign wars, mass deportations, and tax cuts for the wealthy elite.

Let's end Trump's illegal war, cancel his costly tariffs, disband ICE, and cut taxes for working families—not billionaires.

'DOGE' may say they're gone, but Elon Musk's minions are still embedded in our agencies—to slash your benefits and steal your data. I’m standing with @StopMoneyPipe and Americans all across the country to get real answers and accountability for this scam! https://t.co/h46uzpSKfk

My plan with @RepJoeCourtney will go a long way to help homeowners with crumbling foundations afford to make the repairs they need.

The House must pass it so residents can get the tax relief they deserve, and homeowners who already replaced their foundations can be made whole. https://t.co/kHafHv62fI

Your tax dollars are not Donald Trump's personal ATM. The attorneys who signed off on this settlement should face accountability—including Todd Blanche. Congress must pass my bill to stop this scam, including their shady deal to shield the President from paying the taxes he owes.

Connecticut is leading the way to protect our kids—with the highest childhood vaccination rate in the country. We'll continue to build trust and invest in public health.

But in Washington, RFK Jr. is putting his anti-vax conspiracies ahead of children's safety. He needs to go! https://t.co/oben6pIWea

I had a great time at Immanuel House, hearing directly from residents in Hartford. In Congress, I'm working to enhance Social Security benefits to keep pace with rising costs, bring down the price of prescription drugs, and cut taxes for families and seniors, not billionaires! https://t.co/wW3E4sYTWH

While Black and Brown communities bear the brunt of air pollution, Trump and the Republicans want to gut the EPA and zero out funding for environmental justice. I'm fighting with @SierraClubCT to prevent these cuts and safeguard residents from pollution. https://t.co/D87KwE0h0E

We visited the Alvin & Beatrice Wood Human Services Center in Bloomfield to hear directly from seniors about the issues that matter most. Americans deserve an economy that works for them, not Trump and his billionaire buddies. I’m proud to stand with @ChrisMurphyCT in that fight. https://t.co/A5MGOyauAY

With Temporary Protected Status set to expire for El Salvador, @RepMcGovern and I are urging officials to extend these protections now. The law is clear that TPS must be extended when return isn't safe. Letting this lapse would put 200,000 Salvadorans living in the U.S. at risk. https://t.co/9VYCiMSyGY

Residents across Eastern and Central Connecticut have been plagued with crumbling foundations. Hearing how families could lose their homes and livelihoods is heartbreaking. My bill with @RepJoeCourtney will get homeowners the tax relief they need. It just passed out of committee! https://t.co/YcRrssdAMR

Congress came together to act on housing, with a plan to build more homes, lower costs, and take on corporate landlords.  Trump called it a "big yawn," and refused to sign it, pushing for his "SAVE Act" to rig the midterms.  At midnight, our law went into effect—without him.

Trump is rushing another White House project with zero transparency, sticking workers with overtime and potentially leaving taxpayers to foot the bill.
 
Call us names all you want, Donald. Answer the questions Americans are demanding. https://t.co/dgjiousL5J

I enjoyed meeting Hartford residents with my good friend Representative Minnie Gonzalez. Whether it’s Medicaid, SNAP, or Social Security, Trump and the billionaires are trying to slash and privatize the benefits people rely on to make ends meet. Together, we stand in their way! https://t.co/QM65DytYjx

Seyo's abduction by armed ICE agents was not a unique experience. This administration wants to strike fear in the hearts of immigrant families.

Now is not the time to roll over and give up. We can't let Trump win. A week ago, Seyo was released. I'll never stop speaking out! https://t.co/miVsCfOIqv

Last night, Donald Trump fired every member of the commission that leads efforts to keep our elections free, fair, and secure. This is one more step in his plan to take over the midterms. We all must speak out against Trump's election interference scheme! https://t.co/CSasjxilUg

It was great to visit Carey Manufacturing in Cromwell with @SenBlumenthal to announce $1.85 MILLION in funding for @CONNSTEP. Proud that we beat back Trump’s attempt to end the Manufacturing Extension Partnership and brought home new investments to help local manufacturers grow. https://t.co/GnHaRFYQ1p

Trump officials broke the law to rip apart Haitian and Syrian families fleeing violence, and the Supreme Court let them do it.

This decision is cruel and dangerous. We passed a bill to extend protections for Haiti in the House. The Senate needs to act. https://t.co/CDNcOp2QyV
RT @ChrisMurphyCT: Stopped by the Bloomfield Senior Center today with @RepJohnLarson to talk about his bill to increase Social Security ben…

As many as 35,000 homes and condos are plagued with crumbling foundations. Residents have paid exorbitant bills to replace their foundations and make sure their homes are safe.
 
Our tax relief plan to help homeowners afford their repairs just passed out of the @WaysMeansCmte! https://t.co/g6W7VpboUR

Glad to be in South Windsor and East Hartford with local leaders and my friend @JonBowzerBauman from Sha Na Na.   Trump and the billionaires are after Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security. We’ll stop their cuts and ENHANCE benefits by making the wealthy pay their fair share! https://t.co/bNNDlDCVM2

Trump's waging war on our constitutional rights. He limited abortion rights, tried to end birthright citizenship, and wants to restrict your right to vote.

His SAVE Act would make it harder for women, students, and even our troops, to cast their ballots. We won't stand for it! https://t.co/tMp16p3kYA

Trump is rushing to complete yet another White House project without providing Americans the transparency they deserve.

It’s a slap in the face to workers who’ll have to work overtime and the taxpayers who may foot the bill... so he can impress the President of China?!

July is Disability Pride Month, a time to celebrate the achievements, leadership, and contributions of Americans with disabilities.

This month and every month, we reaffirm our commitment to equity and accessibility for all. https://t.co/Ux5Rgip0ut

Donald Trump thinks he can intimidate us with lame insults like “Dumocrats,” while he wastes taxpayer dollars on his vanity projects.   I’m not going to stop fighting for working people and standing up for Connecticut no matter what he does. And I’m proud to be on his hit list. https://t.co/t3MXtqCBEg

Yesterday, @RepJoeCourtney and I came together with local leaders and impacted homeowners with some good news. Our tax relief plan for homeowners with crumbling foundations is moving forward in Congress. It just passed out of committee with bipartisan support. Let’s get it done! https://t.co/eMcNBjkUZh

It was great to meet residents in Manchester and Berlin with @JonBowzerBauman from Sha Na Na.  Seniors rely on Medicare & Social Security to make ends meet—but they’re under attack by billionaires who refuse to pay their fair share. We won’t let them steal your EARNED BENEFITS! https://t.co/hLuv4QT9Kl

Republicans want to cut the EPA in half and COMPLETELY DEFUND environmental justice programs because they don't believe in climate change. Denying facts doesn't prevent flooding or improve air quality. That's why I'm standing up to stop their cuts and hold polluters accountable! https://t.co/uZpmjPJvtI

As we face a nursing shortage, Trump officials tried to say their degrees aren’t “professional,” forcing students to pay more. What an insult!

Our delegation fought back to protect aid for nursing students from these cuts, and we won. Keep speaking out. https://t.co/CCGBxpPX7P

When Trump signed the Big, Ugly Bill, he said it would lower prices, but instead, he cut taxes for billionaires on your dime.

Americans are paying more at the pump, utility bills are skyrocketing, and healthcare premiums have doubled. Voting against that scam was a no-brainer!

Countless residents in our region have been stuck footing the bill to replace a crumbling foundation, through no fault of their own.

@RepJoeCourtney and I have a bill to help homeowners afford the repairs they need. Proud to announce that it just passed UNANIMOUSLY in committee! https://t.co/5vYrw2PNhC

Donald Trump tried to strip citizenship from millions of children. His attack on birthright citizenship was not only illegal—it was an attack on our core American values.

The Supreme Court may have struck down his unconstitutional edict this time, but we must keep speaking out. https://t.co/bJ6MSwMXWm

Torrington was hit hard by storms over the weekend, sustaining downed trees, power outages & property damage. I joined Mayor Spino and local officials to discuss cleanup efforts and offer support. I want to thank the city and state for working together to ensure a swift response.

‘DOGE’ slashed staff and services at Social Security—and took your personal data.

They cut cancer treatments for kids and attacked veterans’ care.

They may say they’re gone, but they’re still embedded in our agencies—and we’re still demanding answers and accountability.

The Trump Administration can't stop playing politics with your health and safety. They're pushing a new plan to give partisan officials final say over grants.

Lifesaving medical research shouldn't become a political football. I'm fighting back against Trump and his sycophants! https://t.co/cb3WyH40Hd

Seyo raised a family and started two businesses in our community. That didn't stop armed ICE agents from tearing him from his sons in a Dunkin' parking lot.
 
This isn't Russia. This isn't China. This is the United States of America. These Gestapo tactics need to come to an end! https://t.co/xxW2rbG8un

The Post Office is threatening to block the delivery of absentee ballots in CT unless we give your voting records to Trump's cronies. Last week, a judge blocked this ridiculous rule.

@RepRobertGarcia, @RepJoeMorelle and I are urging the Postmaster General to rescind it for good!

Americans stood firm and Republicans blinked. They knew they couldn’t push through a bill to water down and strip benefits from millions of veterans, and backed down. We need real solutions, like the Major Richard Star Act, to give them what they’re owed! https://t.co/wmUhf6QHgI

Trump policies have pushed Social Security’s insolvency closer than ever. There’s a simple solution. Make the wealthy pay their fair share!
 Thank you to @SenWarren and Senator Moreno for speaking out. Congress needs to act. Let’s have a vote — and enhance your EARNED BENEFITS! https://t.co/LEmJclJY1o

Asthma doesn't wait for an election. We need action NOW to protect our communities from pollution.

If it impacts you, it impacts me. While Trump might call climate change a "hoax," I stand with you in the fight for clean air and clean water. It's time for a #GreenNewDeal. https://t.co/WlqKp2URfY

This decision is cruel and dangerous. We passed a bill to extend protections for Haiti in the House. The Senate needs to act. https://t.co/CDNcOp2QyV
